Alexandria – Internal Alert

⚠️ Weekly Content Notification Failed to Send

${RUN_DATE}

The weekly content digest workflow ran successfully and found new articles, but failed to generate AI summaries via Gemini. No subscriber email was sent. The tracking tag is updated, so the git head will be updated on the next scheduled run.

Error Reason

${GEMINI_ERROR}

View Failed Run →

This is an internal alert from ${REPO_NAME}. Subscribers were not notified.
